title: ‘He knows who the boss is’: Trump says Netanyahu requested meeting, hints visit could happen next week- Report
content:
• US President Donald Trump has a planned trip to Turkey for the NATO summit on July 7-8.
• US President Donald Trump reportedly signed a memorandum of understanding last month extending the ceasefire with Iran and restarting nuclear negotiations.
• Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu congratulated the United States on its 250th Independence Day.

title: E20 petrol backlash grows: 53% of vehicle owners call rollout 'disastrous', 66% report mileage drop, survey finds
content:
• India achieved nationwide availability of E20 petrol in April 2025, meeting its 20% ethanol blending target six years ahead of the original 2030 deadline.
• From April 1, 2026, all E20 petrol sold in the country must comply with a minimum Research Octane Number (RON) of 95.
• In May 2026, the Bureau of Indian Standards notified IS 19850:2026, establishing specifications for ethanol blends ranging from E22 to E30, with effect from May 15.

title: Trump wants Qatar-gifted Air Force One at his presidential library, but hurdles remain: Report
content:
• US President Donald Trump is currently flying aboard a Boeing 747-8 aircraft, which was gifted by Qatar.
• Donald Trump ordered two new Boeing aircraft to serve as Air Force One in 2017, with the first jet expected to be delivered in mid-2028.
• The Qatar-gifted Boeing 747-8 was valued at approximately $400 million when donated, underwent about $400 million in taxpayer-funded military upgrades, and its ownership was transferred to the Air Force in spring 2025.

title: US weather alert: National Weather Service warns of 105°F heat index and poor air quality after July 4 storms
content:
• The US National Weather Service (NWS) issued a Heat Advisory until 8 p.m. EDT Sunday, with heat index values expected to reach 106°F (41.1°C) in parts of the Mid-Atlantic, southeast Maryland, northeast North Carolina, and central and eastern Virginia.
• The Colorado Department of Public Health and Environment issued an Air Quality Health Advisory through 9 a.m. Monday, covering more than 20 counties, due to wildfire smoke drifting from fires in Colorado and Utah.
• A Flood Warning for Bodcau Bayou at Bayou Bodcau Lake in Louisiana (Bossier and Webster parishes) indicates the river is forecast to rise above the flood stage of 172 feet on Sunday afternoon and crest near 175 feet by Tuesday morning.

title: Falling oil prices give RBI more room to focus on growth, but relief uneven across Asia: Standard Chartered
content:
• Falling oil prices offer "disinflationary relief" for monetary policy across much of Asia, giving central banks like India's RBI more room to shift focus toward supporting growth.
• Cheaper crude directly lowers imported inflation and eases strain on the balance of payments for heavy energy-importing economies such as India, Thailand, and the Philippines.
• Standard Chartered estimated a 63 per cent probability of a "Super El Nino" forming in the fourth quarter, which could hit agricultural output and drive up energy prices, reviving inflationary pressure.

title: Purabi Dairy, NDDB and Suzuki R&D India sign MoU to establish compressed biogas plant in Assam
content:
• Purabi Dairy, National Dairy Development Board (NDDB), and Suzuki R&D India have signed an MoU to establish a compressed biogas plant in Assam.
• Under the collaboration, Suzuki R&D India will invest in the project, NDDB will provide technical and institutional support, and North East Dairy and Foods Limited (NEDFL) will execute and operate the proposed CBG plant.
• The new biogas plant in Assam is part of Suzuki Motor Corporation's broader involvement in nine biogas plants across India, with two already operational in Banaskantha, Gujarat.

title: New incentive package targets growth in Ladakh’s Pashmina economy
content:
• A 25 per cent production-based incentive for Pashmina herders has been approved under the Livestock Development Incentive Programme in Ladakh.
• An ₹8-crore revolving fund has been approved to ensure timely payments to Pashmina herders in Ladakh.
• The Ladakh administration aims to double the Pashmina goat population from two lakh to four lakh over the next three years and raise the average yield from 200 grams to 350 grams per goat.

title: From tax portal to digital public infrastructure: GSTN’s nine-year transformation
content:
• India rolled out the Goods and Services Tax (GST) on July 1, 2017, marking one of its most ambitious economic reforms.
• The GST system currently serves nearly 1.65 crore active taxpayers, handling close to ₹1.8 lakh crore in monthly tax payments through gateways connected with banks and the Reserve Bank of India.
• GSTN has been included as a Financial Information Provider (FIP) under the Reserve Bank of India’s (RBI) Account Aggregator framework, enabling cash flow-based lending for MSMEs with taxpayer consent.

title: Centre releases ₹25,863 crore first instalment under VB-G RAM G Yojana
content:
• The Centre released the first instalment of ₹25,863 crore to all states under the Viksit Bharat G-RAM-G Yojana.
• The Viksit Bharat G-RAM-G Yojana enhanced the employment guarantee from 100 days to 125 days for rural households.
• Under the new framework of the Viksit Bharat G-RAM-G Yojana, the fund sharing between the Centre and States has been set at a 60:40 ratio.
